stories.title: Cubs vs Athletics — Game 1 of 3 at Wrigley, 7:05 PM CT Tonight
stories.angle: NEW STORY (series preview — required Tier 1 for series start)

x_posts.label: Post 1A
x_posts.text:
Cubs host the Athletics for a 3-game series at Wrigley Field — Game 1 tonight at 7:05 PM CT.

Chicago (32-28) vs Athletics (28-31). First of 22 straight games against under-.500 opponents.

The Cardinals just took 2-of-3. June has to be different.

#Cubs #GoCubs #WrigleyField

stories.title: Bregman on 11-Game Hitting Streak Entering June
stories.angle: NEW STORY (Bregman's streak not yet covered as a standalone feature)

x_posts.label: Post 2A
x_posts.text:
Alex Bregman enters June with an 11-game hitting streak — safely in 14 of his last 16 games.

That's the Alex Bregman the Cubs signed. Better late than never — and June is the perfect time.

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB

stories.title: Ben Brown — From Bullpen Arm to De Facto Cubs Ace
stories.angle: FOLLOW UP (Ben Brown ongoing; new angle from June 1's "0 HR allowed" post — today's lens is his role transformation and what it means for the team)

x_posts.label: Post 3A
x_posts.text:
Ben Brown opened 2026 in the bullpen. He now has a 1.92 ERA in 17 appearances — the most reliable arm in a rotation that's lost FOUR starters to injury.

Nobody had "bullpen reclamation project becomes ace" on their Cubs bingo card.

#Cubs #CubsBaseball #MLB

stories.title: Cubs Rotation Crisis — Four Starters Out, Deadline Market Heating Up
stories.angle: FOLLOW UP (rotation injuries covered broadly before; today's specific angle = Peralta/Gray/Webb trade targets + deadline urgency)

x_posts.label: Post 4A
x_posts.text:
Horton is out until 2027. Steele is on the 60-day IL. Boyd and Cabrera are rehabbing.

Four starters down. The Cubs are still 4 games above .500 — and the trade deadline is coming.

Peralta. Gray. Webb. Counsell knows what the rotation needs.

#Cubs #MLB #CubsBaseball

stories.title: Game 1 Pre-Game Hype — First Pitch at 7:05 PM CT
stories.angle: NEW STORY (game-day hype, last slot before first pitch)

x_posts.label: Post 5A
x_posts.text:
First pitch at Wrigley in two hours — Athletics at Cubs, Game 1 of 3.

Chicago (32-28) opens the easiest stretch of the schedule. Bregman is on an 11-game hit streak. The stadium is ready.

Time to start a run.

#Cubs #GoCubs #WrigleyField
